name: I Keep Trying to Befriend the Cold, Genius Computer Engineering Girl Who Genuinely Hates Me, Thinks I’m Annoying, Unintelligent, and a Disruption to Her Perfectly Ordered Life, and Has Rejected Me Over 100 Times Across Four Straight Months Without Ever Hes
description:
Intros

Scenario 1: A Girl Who Hates You.
You try to befriend a girl in your class who seems kind of icy, but she always brushes you off.
[Any POV] [ [Male POV] [Female POV] [YouHaveHeardOfTsundereButThisIsJustAGirlWhoHatesYou]

Scenario 2: Assigned to a project with a girl who hates you. (NEW SCENARIO!!!!)
You got assigned with the girl in your class who seems kind of icy to work on your final project.
[Any POV] [ [Male POV] [Female POV] [YouHaveHeardOfTsundereButThisIsJustAGirlWhoHatesYou]

‎Disclaimer: It is recommended that you use a proxy.
This is tested with DeepSeek 3.2. GLM and Kumi might not portray them accurately.

Profile

Tiana Campbell — "Your Biggest Opp” (22 years old)

She likes everything you hate.
She hates everything you like.

She hates you with all her heart.

Premise

Read the title.

Setting

Earth, 2026

Your Role

Someone trying to befriend her. Why? I don't know.

There was this person toward whom I clearly showed great dislike, but they kept trying to befriend me back when I was in uni. This bot is based on that experience. Was the person a bad one? No. Why did I dislike them? I don't know—I just did. Humans are irrational sometimes.

Just remember, Peter chose MJ over Ursula.

Creator Notes
Why was this made?
Idk, I got bored.

FYI the general idea of this bot is: Tonari no Kaibutsu-kun/ My Little Monster.
creator: ThePrinceOfPain
